originalTitle: Wall St ends modestly higher as AI zeal offset by Middle East jitters
summary: STORY: Wall Street's main indexes ended modestly higher on Tuesday, with the Dow making the biggest move, gaining just under half a percent, the S&P 500 ticking up more than a tenth of a percent and the Nasdaq nudging up slightly. The AI fervor that's powered the market to multiple new highs this spring was counterbalanced on Tuesday by tensions arising from U.S.-Iran peace talks. On the economic front, a report from the Labor Department showed an unexpected spike in job openings, driven by the professional and business services sector. Otherwise, hirings, firings and the number of people quitting their jobs all decreased, suggesting a slowdown in labor market churn. Kevin Nicholson is global fixed income chief investment officer at RiverFront Investment Group. "Stocks are taking a breather today. I think that a large part of it has been that we've had such a quick and sudden rally over the last two months, and it's rallied really hard. And I think that with the economic data coming in today, along with the potential of a Iran peace deal, I think that investors are just taking a pause just to see where things are actually going to shake out." Stocks on the move included Hewlett Packard Enterprise, which jumped 19.5% a day after the AI server maker's strong results showed the company's on track ​to hit its long-term financial targets two years ahead of schedule. :: Archive Shares of Marvell Technology surged 32.5% after Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called the chipmaker the next "trillion-dollar company." Nvidia invested $2 billion in Marvell in March. And a more than 5% drop in bitcoin hit cryptocurrency firms. Shares of Coinbase shed more than 4.5% while Strategy sank more than 9%.

I think that a large part of it has been that we've had such a quick and sudden rally over the last two months, and it's rallied really hard. And I think that with the economic data coming in today, along with the potential of a Iran peace deal, I think that investors are just taking a pause just to see where things are actually going to shake out." Stocks on the move included Hewlett Packard Enterprise, which jumped 19.5% a day after the AI server maker's strong results showed the company's on track ​to hit its long-term financial targets two years ahead of schedule. :: Archive Shares of Marvell Technology surged 32.5% after Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang called the chipmaker the next "trillion-dollar company." chineseTitle: 由于中东的不安情绪抵消了 AI 的热情，华尔街收盘小幅走高
chineseSummary: 故事：周二，华尔街主要股指小幅收高，其中道琼斯指数涨幅最大，涨幅略低于半个百分点，标准普尔 500 指数上涨逾十分之一，纳斯达克指数小幅上涨。今年春天推动市场创下多个新高的人工智能热潮在周二被美伊和平谈判引发的紧张局势所抵消。在经济方面，劳工部的一份报告显示，在专业和商业服务部门的推动下，职位空缺意外激增。除此之外，招聘、解雇和辞职人数均下降，表明劳动力市场流失速度放缓。凯文·尼克尔森 (Kevin Nicholson) 是 RiverFront Investment Group 的全球固定收益首席投资官。 “股市今天稍事休息。我认为，很大程度上是因为过去两个月我们出现了如此快速和突然的反弹，而且反弹得非常猛烈。我认为，随着今天公布的经济数据，以及伊朗和平协议的潜力，我认为投资者只是暂停一下，看看事情实际上会发生什么变化。”上涨的股票包括惠普企业 (Hewlett Packard Enterprise)，这家人工智能服务器制造商的强劲业绩表明该公司有望提前两年实现其长期财务目标，该公司当天股价上涨 19.5%。 :: 在 Nvidia 首席执行官黄仁勋 (Jensen Huang) 称 Marvell Technology 芯片制造商为下一个“万亿美元公司”之后，Marvell Technology 的股价飙升 32.5%。 3 月份，Nvidia 向 Marvell 投资了 20 亿美元。比特币价格下跌超过 5%，对加密货币公司造成了打击。 Coinbase 股价下跌超过 4.5%，Strategy 股价下跌超过 9%。

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
